title: Major Issues in Contemporary Africa
description: Quiz on key contemporary challenges facing Africa including conflict, poverty, HIV/AIDS, gender inequality, and good governance.

questions.question: Which of the following has been one of the major challenges facing post-independence Africa?
According to the AU, which group of African countries was most seriously affected by conflict?
What was the primary cause of most armed conflicts in Africa?
What percentage of the world's HIV/AIDS infected people live in sub-Saharan Africa?
Why has good governance been difficult to achieve since independence?
options: Lack of a strong democratic culture and political instability
questions.correctAnswer: Lack of a strong democratic culture and political instability

questions.question: What has been one of the major consequences of poverty in Africa?
options: Child malnutrition and high infant mortality
questions.correctAnswer: Child malnutrition and high infant mortality

questions.question: Which organisation launched the New Partnership for Africa's Development (NEPAD)?
What is the impact of foreign debt on African countries?
options: It prevents them from expanding essential social and economic services
questions.correctAnswer: It prevents them from expanding essential social and economic services

questions.question: Which of these factors contributes to gender inequality in Africa?
options: Religious and customary practices that favour men and boys
questions.correctAnswer: Religious and customary practices that favour men and boys

questions.question: What is NEPAD primarily committed to?
options: Building a strong democratic culture and promoting peace and development
questions.correctAnswer: Building a strong democratic culture and promoting peace and development
